productDisplayName: Puma Men Calibre Tricks Convert Spike White Shoes
description: A contemporary all-round hockey shoe, the puma Calibre Tricks Convert Spike shoe ideally suits players looking for lightweight performance without compromising on stability, support and comfort.UpperLightweight microfiber upper with breathable mesh panelsPerforated toe box for ample ventilationAbrasion resistant toe overlay for longer shoe lifePadded heel for tractionIntegrated lace-wrap stability support systemHigh visibility cosmeticsMidsoleCompression moulded EVA with idCELL heel unit and ArchTec stability shank for maximum grip and shock absorptionSoft EVA innerboard and removable sockliner to accommodate an orthoticOutsoleAnatomically positioned spike plate which can be set up with metal spikes or moulded TPU cleats for optimum traction on all surfaces
